The Immutable Guardian for AI Agents

Secure
Autonomous
DeFi.

Phylax separates AI authority through delegated session signers and enforces policy directly on-chain through Programmable Guardrails.

Guardrail Configuration

MAX DAILY LIMIT50.00 USDC

GUARD EXPIRE WINDOWEXPIRED

DeFi Protocol Whitelist

On-chain rule AI_GuardrailModule.sol intercepts all operations. Any target not in the dynamic list is blocked. Select status to toggle:

SESSION SIGNER SECRET

This is the delegated private key revealed to the AI environment. It is not the owner key and should be shown once during setup.

0xbf4d28f0de9ca2b8da46e8eb497fae017686901f2ab4ce9b1d3f5a7c9e0b123

Autonomous Execution Simulator

Test dynamic policies by dispatching simulated normal or malicious operations. The connected demo backend parses prompts and attempts execution through the delegated session signer.
